title: [LLVM][SimplifyCFG] Allow switch-to-table for some vector constants.
author: paulwalker-arm
patch:
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/SimplifyCFG.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/SimplifyCFG.cpp
index fd9aff0f9fef2..65a8953919aed 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/SimplifyCFG.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Utils/SimplifyCFG.cpp
@@ -6319,12 +6319,12 @@ static bool validLookupTableConstant(Constant *C, const TargetTransformInfo &TTI
   if (C->isDLLImportDependent())
     return false;
 
-  if (!isa<ConstantFP>(C) && !isa<ConstantInt>(C) &&
-      !isa<ConstantPointerNull>(C) && !isa<GlobalValue>(C) &&
-      !isa<UndefValue>(C) && !isa<ConstantExpr>(C))
+  if (!isa<ConstantDataVector, ConstantExpr, ConstantFP, ConstantInt,
+           ConstantPointerNull, GlobalValue, UndefValue>(C))
     return false;
 
-  if (C->getType()->isVectorTy())
+  // Globals cannot contain scalable types.
+  if (C->getType()->isScalableTy())
     return false;
 
   if (ConstantExpr *CE = dyn_cast<ConstantExpr>(C)) {
description: Only applies to fixed length vector constants that are made up of either ConstantInt or ConstantFP elements.

tests.test_body:
target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

define <4 x float> @switch_to_lookup_table_const_vector_splat(i32 %c) {
entry:
  switch i32 %c, label %default [
    i32 0, label %bb0
    i32 1, label %bb1
    i32 2, label %bb2
  ]

bb0:                                              ; preds = %entry
  br label %ret

bb1:                                              ; preds = %entry
  br label %ret

bb2:                                              ; preds = %entry
  br label %ret

default:                                          ; preds = %entry
  unreachable

ret:                                              ; preds = %bb2, %bb1, %bb0
  %phi = phi <4 x float> [ splat (float 1.000000e+00), %bb0 ], [ splat (float 2.000000e+00), %bb1 ], [ splat (float 3.000000e+00), %bb2 ]
  ret <4 x float> %phi
}

target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

define <2 x float> @switch_to_lookup_table_const_vector(i32 %c) {
entry:
  switch i32 %c, label %default [
    i32 0, label %bb0
    i32 1, label %bb1
    i32 2, label %bb2
  ]

bb0:                                              ; preds = %entry
  br label %ret

bb1:                                              ; preds = %entry
  br label %ret

bb2:                                              ; preds = %entry
  br label %ret

default:                                          ; preds = %entry
  unreachable

ret:                                              ; preds = %bb2, %bb1, %bb0
  %phi = phi <2 x float> [ <float 1.000000e+00, float 1.100000e+01>, %bb0 ], [ <float 2.000000e+00, float 2.200000e+01>, %bb1 ], [ <float 3.000000e+00, float 3.300000e+01>, %bb2 ]
  ret <2 x float> %phi
}

target triple = "aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu"

define <vscale x 4 x float> @no_switch_to_lookup_table_const_scalable_vector_splat(i32 %c) {
entry:
  switch i32 %c, label %default [
    i32 0, label %bb0
    i32 1, label %bb1
    i32 2, label %bb2
  ]

bb0:                                              ; preds = %entry
  br label %ret

bb1:                                              ; preds = %entry
  br label %ret

bb2:                                              ; preds = %entry
  br label %ret

default:                                          ; preds = %entry
  unreachable

ret:                                              ; preds = %bb2, %bb1, %bb0
  %phi = phi <vscale x 4 x float> [ splat (float 1.000000e+00), %bb0 ], [ splat (float 2.000000e+00), %bb1 ], [ splat (float 3.000000e+00), %bb2 ]
  ret <vscale x 4 x float> %phi
}
